name: Booke AI
tagline: AI bookkeeper that works inside QuickBooks and Xero automatically
description:
Booke AI is a specialized bookkeeping assistant that integrates directly into your QuickBooks or Xero software. It is designed to automate the most repetitive and time-consuming tasks in your bookkeeping workflow. Instead of simply suggesting entries for you to review and manually post, Booke AI takes action within your accounting platform. It automatically categorizes transactions, matches them to uploaded receipts and invoices, and proceeds to reconcile accounts, all without requiring you to switch between applications.

Key features include its autonomous categorization, which learns from your past entries for accuracy, and its direct document matching that links bills and receipts to bank transactions. A standout feature is its ability to perform automatic reconciliation, completing the month-end close process with minimal intervention. This tool is ideal for small business owners, bookkeepers, and accountants who use QuickBooks or Xero and want to reclaim hours spent on manual data entry and reconciliation each week.

The main benefit is a significant reduction in manual work and human error, leading to more accurate books and up-to-date financial records. For example, a consultant can upload a month's worth of client expense receipts; Booke AI will then find the corresponding bank transactions, categorize them correctly, attach the documents, and reconcile the account, leaving the consultant with a task that is completed rather than just organized. Booke AI offers a freemium pricing model, allowing users to start automating their bookkeeping at no initial cost.
cons: May need manual review for unusual transactions
